name: local_folder
label: Local Folder
description: A directory from the client's computer or server synced into this workspace via Syncthing

auth.setup_guide:
Choose any directory on the client device, add it as a Syncthing folder, and share it with this server using the Device ID shown in Infrastructure.

When the pending folder appears in this admin panel, accept it with local path: raw_sources/local/

For multiple folders, accept each one under raw_sources/<source-name>/.
